errors.tokenExpired: Your access token has expired. Please reauthenticate.

authStates.signinRedirect: Redirecting you to your Identity Provider...
authStates.signoutRedirct: Redirecting you to your Identity Provider...
authStates.signoutPopup: Logging you out using a popup

login.error: An error occurred while logging you in
login.information: You need to authenticate yourself before using the management platform.

errors.general:
An error occurred while loading the articles from the server.
Please use local items and contact your administrator.
errors.no-items:
There are no items configured on the server.
Please use local items or add some to the server
errors.no-registers:
There are no registers configured on the server.
Please create one or contact your administrator
errors.unexpected-response:
Unexpected response code received.
Please use local items.
errors.transaction-store-failure:
Due to an unexpected response status code the transaction storage was unsuccessful.
Please contact your administrator if this problem persists

missing-data.title: Card payments not set up
missing-data.description: Due to missing values, accepting card payments using SumUp is unavailable

payment-failed.title: Failure while processing transaction
payment-failed.description: The SumUp App reported an error during the transaction processing
